notes: The content provides a practical guide to building AI workflows with memory for service businesses, which is a unique and valuable angle.
The article includes a clear use case (Slack-based client inquiry triage) and step-by-step implementation guide.
It includes key details like tools needed, implementation difficulty, and business impact which adds credibility.
The content demonstrates clear understanding of the target audience (founders, operators, marketers) and their needs.
The article could benefit from more specific examples of prompt engineering for the AI triage agent.
The content would be strengthened by including more real-world examples of workflow outcomes and specific ROI metrics.
